examples: The decision seems extremely odd, in retrospect.
In retrospect, I wish that I had thought about alternative courses of action.
In retrospect, it is possible to see the uneasy and ambiguous nature of this relationship.
In retrospect, though, my decision was not impulsive: the universe had been giving me signs all along.
In retrospect, I was a sad little boy and a standard-issue, shiftless, egotistical, dejected teen-ager.
